center.name: Chembra Peak
center.summary: Chembra Peak是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白胸噪鹛，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Within this range, fragmented populations are found at Banasura Hill in Wayanad, Chembra Peak, and Vellarimala. The Banasura laughingthrush is primarily found in shola habitat between 1,400 and 2,400 meters in elevation
